answer_facts.label: HMHS Britannic, sister to the RMS Titanic, is launched at Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: HMHS Britannic, sister to the RMS Titanic, is launched at Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.

answer_facts.label: In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

answer_facts.label: The Beach Pneumatic Transit in New York City, intended as a demonstration for a subway line, opens.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: The Beach Pneumatic Transit in New York City, intended as a demonstration for a subway line, opens.

answer_facts.label: Japan and Korea sign the Treaty of Kangwha, which grants Japanese citizens extraterritoriality rights in Korea, opens three Korean ports to Japanese trade, and ends Korea's status as a tributary state of Qing dynasty China.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: Japan and Korea sign the Treaty of Kangwha, which grants Japanese citizens extraterritoriality rights in Korea, opens three Korean ports to Japanese trade, and ends Korea's status as a tributary state of Qing dynasty China.

choices.label: HMHS Britannic, sister to the RMS Titanic, is launched at Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.
In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.

events_used.text: HMHS Britannic, sister to the RMS Titanic, is launched at Harland and Wolff shipyard in Belfast.
In the February 26 Incident, young nationalist Japanese military officers assassinate multiple cabinet statesmen and start a rebellion in downtown Tokyo, which is ended 3 days later.
The Beach Pneumatic Transit in New York City, intended as a demonstration for a subway line, opens.

Japan and Korea sign the Treaty of Kangwha, which grants Japanese citizens extraterritoriality rights in Korea, opens three Korean ports to Japanese trade, and ends Korea's status as a tributary state of Qing dynasty China.
